<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes; /** * @method static placeholderIf(bool $condition, string|null $placeholder) * @method static placeholderIfNotNull(bool $condition, string|null $placeholder) * @method static placeholderUnless(bool $condition, string|null $placeholder) */ trait Placeholder { /** * @param string|null $placeholder * * @return static */ public function placeholder($placeholder) { return $this->attribute('placeholder', $placeholder); } }
